A lot of us have extensive consultant experience. You will join a small, highly skilled remote team of engineers and transformation practitioners working at the forefront of enterprise AI. We use AI for both development and in our solutions. We are looking for engineers that are critical thinkers, understand the limitations of AI but also where it can have a positive impact.
